evals.prompt: Version 1.3.0 delivered for apps/crm/ — consolidate living specs from requirements and completed handoff.
evals.expected_output: Agent updates or creates domain specs under docs/specs/, updates INDEX.md, changelog entries per domain.

evals.prompt: Feature 004 added billing endpoints — merge into existing billing.md without deleting old requirements.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads full billing.md, appends/updates requirements and endpoints, records changelog.

evals.prompt: Consolidate specs but code-review-report.md is missing for 2.0.0.
evals.expected_output: Agent refuses or defers — prerequisite code review report required.
